section_order: Hero → Problem → Features (3) → Social Proof → Pricing → CTA
cta_placement: Above fold primary + after pricing secondary
color_strategy: Brand primary gradient hero; white feature sections alternate
effects: Scroll reveal features; metric counter animation; CTA pulse
conversion_tips: Headline must state value in under 6 words; no carousel in hero

section_order: Hero → Before (pain) → Solution → Transformation → Proof → CTA
color_strategy: Dark pain section → bright solution section contrast
effects: Animated before/after slider; progress reveal; testimonial fade-in
conversion_tips: Show concrete outcome numbers not vague claims

section_order: Big logo/wordmark → Single headline → One CTA → Waitlist form
cta_placement: Center of page single CTA only
color_strategy: Full-screen single color or gradient; minimal text
effects: Subtle particle or gradient animation; form error shake
conversion_tips: Remove all navigation links — zero distraction to conversion

section_order: Hero + screenshot → Key metrics → Features → Integration logos → CTA
cta_placement: Floating sticky CTA in viewport right
color_strategy: Dark demo screenshot contrast on light bg
effects: Interactive dashboard mockup hover; live counter animations
conversion_tips: Show real product UI not marketing illustrations

section_order: Trust bar (logos) → Hero → Social proof wall → Features → CTA
cta_placement: After proof wall when trust is established
color_strategy: White/light neutral; trust signals with authority colors
effects: Review card hover lift; star rating pulse; avatar reveal
conversion_tips: Lead with customer logos before product explanation

section_order: Hook headline → Chapter 1 (problem) → Chapter 2 (journey) → Chapter 3 (solution) → Climax CTA
cta_placement: End of each chapter mini CTA + final climax CTA
color_strategy: Each chapter different tone color; climax uses high-energy CTA color
effects: Progress indicator; section scroll snap; parallax dividers
conversion_tips: Use first-person narrative voice — personal not corporate

section_order: Competitor vs Product table → Why we win → Proof → CTA
color_strategy: Competitor shown in gray/muted; product in brand primary
effects: Animated feature checkmarks reveal; competitor strikethrough
conversion_tips: Be specific — vague claims lose to exact numbers every time

section_order: Pricing upfront → Features justify → FAQ → Social proof → CTA
cta_placement: Pricing page itself IS the CTA
color_strategy: Neutral light bg; highlight recommended plan with brand primary
effects: Plan toggle animation; feature unlock reveal; popular badge pulse
conversion_tips: Annual/monthly toggle increases revenue 15-40% — always include

section_order: Hero (location photo) → Services → About → Reviews → Contact/Map
cta_placement: Phone number + form + map all above fold
color_strategy: Warm local colors; real photos over stock
effects: Google Maps embed; review widget; business hours live
conversion_tips: Phone number must be visible on mobile without scrolling

section_order: Countdown timer → Speaker credentials → Agenda → Registration
color_strategy: Urgency colors — deep blue or dark bg; CTA in high-energy color
effects: Live countdown timer; seat counter; speaker photo reveal
conversion_tips: Show EXACTLY what they will learn — vague agendas kill signups

section_order: Trust logos → ROI metrics → Case study → Security/Compliance → Demo CTA
cta_placement: Demo request form in hero + after case study
color_strategy: Conservative dark blue or navy; no flashy colors
effects: Subtle professional transitions only; animated ROI counter
conversion_tips: Add security certifications (SOC2 ISO27001) — removes enterprise blocker
